name: pytest-optimizer
description: Profile, benchmark, and safely speed up a pytest suite through a resumable four-phase pipeline (scan, benchmark, plan, execute) driven by a weighted safety rubric and a versioned heuristic catalog. Detects the installed pytest version to gate capabilities, separates slow test bodies from slow fixture setup/teardown, finds unused and mis-scoped fixtures, migrates parametrize to the typed NamedTuple + test_id convention, and applies each speedup as its own verified commit.
